mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_likes (user_id, comment_id, liked_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{commentId}, #{likedAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_likes WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
